name: mixed_tasks_demo
description: Combines SIMPLE workers with INLINE system tasks

inputParameters.expression: (function() { var orders = $.orders; var total = 0; for (var i = 0; i < orders.length; i++) { total += orders[i].amount; } var avg = Math.round(total / orders.length); var max = 0; for (var i = 0; i < orders.length; i++) { if (orders[i].amount > max) max = orders[i].amount; } return { totalRevenue: total, avgOrderValue: avg, maxOrder: max, orderCount: orders.length }; })()
(function() { return { subject: 'Store ' + $.storeId + ' Report', body: 'Revenue: $' + $.totalRevenue + ' from ' + $.orderCount + ' orders. Chart: ' + $.chartUrl }; })()
